data.title: Circle plans to bring Hashnote tokenized money market fund under Bermuda regulation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: USDC stablecoin issuer Circle plans to bring its recently acquired Hashnote tokenized money market fund under the regulatory scope of Bermuda. It is reported that Hashnote has issued the largest tokenized money market fund USYC, with an asset size of nearly US$1 billion. Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire believes that operating in Bermuda is a "natural choice" for USYC given Bermuda's role in digital asset regulation. (Coindesk)

data.title: BNY Mellon to allow some clients to send and receive money from Circle to support stablecoin transactions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) is expanding its services for stablecoin issuer Circle. People familiar with the matter said that the bank will allow some customers to remit money to or receive money from Circle through BNY to buy or sell Circle's stablecoins. Previously, Circle's customers had to use small banks in the United States to remit money to Circle, which may limit its development scale. (The Information)

data.title: Aave Labs launches Horizon project, which may create a new revenue source for Aave DAO
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Aave Labs announced the launch of a new program called Horizon, which aims to develop RWA products (such as tokenized securities) to achieve institutional adoption of DeFi. Its goal is to use the Aave ecosystem as a foundation to bridge the gap between traditional finance and DeFi. It is reported that Horizon's first product will be a structured real-world asset solution that allows institutions to use tokenized money market funds as collateral to obtain stablecoin liquidity, and the stablecoin GHO will serve as the main source of liquidity. Aave Labs said the move may create a new source of income for Aave DAO. (Theblock)

data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid spent 3.7 million USDC to buy 1961 ETH 20 minutes ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid continued to increase its $ETH spot position after closing its position. 20 minutes ago, it spent 3.7 million USDC to buy 1,961 ETH. In the past three days, the cumulative number of ETH purchased increased to 7,872, with an average cost of $1,961. The current floating loss is $727,000.

data.title: Circle to Integrate Hashnote Tokenized Fund Under Bermuda Regulation
data.description: According to Foresight News, stablecoin issuer Circle plans to incorporate its recently acquired Hashnote tokenized money market fund under Bermuda's regulatory framework. This move will align the fund with Circle's existing Digital Assets Business Act (DABA) license. Data from rwa.xyz indicates that Hashnote has issued one of the largest tokenized money market funds, USYC, which manages nearly $1 billion in assets.

data.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Ratings for Bitcoin Mining Companies
data.description: According to Odaily, JPMorgan has revised its ratings for several Bitcoin mining companies. The financial institution upgraded the rating of Bitcoin mining firm IREN from 'neutral' to 'overweight.' Conversely, Cipher Mining's rating was downgraded from 'overweight' to 'neutral.' Additionally, JPMorgan maintained an 'overweight' rating for Riot Platforms and CleanSpark, while MARA Holdings received a 'neutral' rating.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 82,000 USDT with a 1.35% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2025, 13:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 82,000 USDT and is now trading at 81,976 USDT, with a narrowed 1.35% decrease in 24 hours.
